evals.prompt: I just finished a long session in demo-directus-nextjs. I added a deploy.sh for Vercel, fixed the Docker hot-reload by adding a volume mount, and created a useDirectus composable. I think some of this should go into the parent template. Can you help me sort it out?
evals.expected_output: The wrap-up skill reviews the session, categorizes each improvement (deploy.sh → Level 1, Docker fix → Level 1, useDirectus composable → project-only), presents the categorized findings, asks whether to apply/issue/record, and applies the chosen action.
expectations: Identifies deploy.sh as a Level 1 improvement (stack-specific, generic to all Directus+Next.js)
Identifies Docker hot-reload fix as a Level 1 improvement (stack-specific config)
Identifies useDirectus composable as project-only (demo-specific, not generic enough)
Does NOT push the useDirectus composable to the parent template
Presents categorized findings to the user before taking action
Offers multiple options: apply to parent, create GitHub Issue, record in LEARNINGS.md, or skip
If applying, delegates to the feedback skill for each improvement
